title: 有馬記念の後に・涙の先へ、いつか

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't that amazing?! The crowd was cheering
the entire time I was running!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I could hear everything! They were saying "Go,
Urara, go!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And I was trying so hard to pass the person in
front of me.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I was running so fast! But I couldn't reach her...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If my legs were just a little longer, I could have
done it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wh-why am I crying? I had so much fun...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Even though it was so fun, and I wanna do it again, I... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It was so fun! So, so fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara finally took a race seriously, and
because of that, she feels bad about losing. This
is most certainly proof of her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After that, I pat her back until she stops crying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it didn't end in a win, Haru Urara still
managed to qualify and run in her dream race,
and for that alone, she should be very proud.
